site.author: Blake Donovan
site.author_bio: Blake has reviewed Australian online casinos since 2019, specialising in payout speed and pokie variety.

language.ratio: 70/30 — preferred terms should dominate but secondary terms are acceptable for variation
language.notes: Use 'pokies' primarily (70%+), 'slots' acceptable for keyword variation. Use 'punters' primarily, 'players' acceptable for natural flow. Both are valid AU English. Solana (SOL) is a rising AU withdrawal method.
